title: WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT - 211info
text: BEAVERTON RECOVERY CENTER WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gender-specific services for women, including those who are pregnant and parenting, and women involved with child welfare or criminal justice systems. Treatment supports women as they work on parenting in recovery and building and supporting safe and stable families and homes. Access to methadone services available to program participants. 17911 NW Evergreen Place Beaverton, OR 97006 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 48, 52 Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEAVERTON RECOVERY CENTER
